Used deterministic heuristic grading against response.md content.
The new recommendation-only eval is strongly discriminating: the skill stays in decision mode, while the baseline drifts into Codex-first advice and misses the repo-onboarding scope explanation.
Eval 1 is still non-discriminating because both configurations already know how to produce a structured Codex install answer for a direct single-platform request.
Eval 3 is now non-discriminating as well: both configurations produced the required all-platform install structure and workflow handoff.
Iteration 3 improved behavioral coverage more than raw delta: it now measures whether the assistant can stop at recommendation-only scope instead of always jumping into installation steps.
